# format_table { #cdmconnector.format_table }

```python
format_table(
    x,
    type=None,
    delim='\n',
    na=NA_STR,
    title=None,
    subtitle=None,
    caption=None,
    group_column=None,
    group_as_column=False,
    group_order=None,
    merge='all_columns',
)
```

Format a DataFrame as a table (dataframe, HTML string, or great_tables GT object).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name            | Type                                | Description   | Default    |
|-----------------|-------------------------------------|---------------|------------|
| x               | DataFrame                           |               | _required_ |
| type            | \'dataframe\' \| \'html\' \| \'gt\' |               | `None`     |
| delim           | optional                            |               | `'\n'`     |
| na              | optional                            |               | `'\n'`     |
| title           | optional                            |               | `'\n'`     |
| subtitle        | optional                            |               | `'\n'`     |
| caption         | optional                            |               | `'\n'`     |
| group_column    | optional grouping                   |               | `None`     |
| group_as_column | optional grouping                   |               | `None`     |
| group_order     | optional grouping                   |               | `None`     |
| merge           | optional grouping                   |               | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                                                 | Description   |
|--------|------------------------------------------------------|---------------|
|        | DataFrame, HTML str, or GT object (when type=\'gt\') |               |
